pre_code_file_map: game/entities/buildings/base.py — Building core; HP/work; construction_progress property (HP curve).
game/engine.py — get_game_state(); buildings list + buildings_construction_progress tuple.

architecture_options: OPT A — Keep derived construction_progress property + tuple snapshot (current). PROS: single source of truth; no new sim state; matches peasant apply_work. CONS: renderer must treat damaged-built as full stage. RISK: LOW. EFFORT: S (already shipped).
OPT B — Store explicit float field updated in apply_work. PROS: obvious serialization. CONS: duplicate bookkeeping vs HP. RISK: MED (drift). EFFORT: M.
OPT C — Time-based progress from placed_time_ms. CONS: fights existing HP-based build; adds coupling. REJECTED.
agent_fields.architecture_chosen: OPT A — accepted; PM confirms property already exists; revised round is verify-only.
agent_fields.existing_code_conflicts: None for Agent 05. PM notes WK32-BUG-002 remaining work is Ursina resolver (Agent 03), not sim. pm_role_note: uncommitted PM edits are in ursina_renderer.py / ursina_app.py (Agent 03 ownership).

game/engine.py: get_game_state() adds buildings_construction_progress tuple (parallel to buildings) + docstring.
game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: Chebyshev min-distance >= 2 between auto-spawn candidate footprint and any existing building (and optional same-tick pending footprints).
tests/test_building.py: construction_progress assertions + dedicated tests.
tests/test_neutral_buildings_wk32.py: gap helper unit tests + integration test test_neutral_autospawn_pairwise_min_chebyshev_ge2_vs_castle_and_each_other (WK32 revised verification).
verification_2026_04_18: (A) construction_progress: unit tests assert 0 at mark_unconstructed, mid-curve (hp-1)/(max-1), 1.0 when built/damaged-built; monotonicity implied by HP-only curve.
(B) auto-spawn spacing: integration test simulates 500 NeutralBuildingSystem ticks with 12 heroes; all pairwise building footprints (including castle) have min Chebyshev >= 2.

agent_fields.summary: WK32 R2 Workstream F: Re-ran multi-seed and 200-hero stress on full GameEngine; 0 sim pairwise Chebyshev violations (all building footprints min distance >=2). Hardened NeutralBuildingSystem._count with _building_type_str so str-Enum building types count toward spawn caps. Clarified in _violates_auto_spawn_gap that min_tile_gap=2 is the usual one empty grid cell between two rectangles. Added real-GameEngine parametric pytest (seeds 1, 42, 1337) and _count str/enum test. If Ursina playtest still shows edge-touching, treat as 3D mesh/prefab extent vs grid (Agent 03/09), not NeutralBuildingSystem math.

tests/test_neutral_buildings_wk32.py — test_neutral_count_matches_str_and_enum_building_type; test_neutral_autospawn_real_engine_pairwise_min_chebyshev_ge2
agent_fields.repro: No failing sim seed in local stress (13 seeds + 200 heroes) — pairwise d<2 count 0. Ticket WK32-R2-BUG-003: if issue persists, capture seed/SIM_SEED and confirm observation is sim grid vs render mesh.

sprint_meta.notes: WK43 Stage 1: neutral plots + BuilderPeasant lifecycle (Agent 05 core sim/entity work).

what_i_changed: game/entities/neutral_buildings.py: NeutralBuilding + House/Farm/FoodStand now accept is_constructed; plots spawn with hp=1, is_constructed=False, requires_builder_peasant=True; neutral tax generation pauses until constructed.
game/entities/peasant.py: Regular peasants skip builder-only plots (requires_builder_peasant).

game/entities/builder_peasant.py (new): BuilderPeasant entity with lifecycle MOVE_TO_PLOT -> BUILDING -> RETURN_TO_CASTLE -> DESPAWN; marks plot requires_builder_peasant=False when construction completes.

game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: tick signature updated to tick(dt, buildings, heroes, peasants, castle); spawns plots + a BuilderPeasant; despawns builders once they reach the castle (removes from peasants list).
game/sim_engine.py: pass self.peasants into NeutralBuildingSystem.tick call site.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py (new): plot spawns unconstructed; builder constructs; builder returns + despawns; regular peasant ignores builder-only plots.
tests/test_neutral_buildings_wk32.py: updated NeutralBuildingSystem.tick call sites for new signature.

sprint_meta.notes: WK44 Stage 2: dynamic tree growth sim components (Tree + NatureSystem + unit tests). Integration owned by Agent 03.

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/sim/snapshot.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration).
what_i_changed: game/entities/nature.py (new): Tree dataclass with grid_x/grid_y, growth_percentage (default 0.25), growth_ms_accum and stable (tx,ty) key.
game/systems/nature.py (new): NatureSystem.tick(dt, trees) advances growth deterministically in discrete steps 0.25->0.5->0.75->1.0, with 2 minutes per transition (~6 minutes total).
tests/test_nature_growth.py (new): verifies growth hits 0.25/0.5/0.75/1.0 at 0/2/4/6 minutes.

sprint_meta.notes: WK45 Stage 2.5: sapling spawning logic in NatureSystem + tests (no integration files touched; Agent 03 owns wiring + removal-on-build).

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration + removal-on-build).
what_i_changed: game/systems/nature.py: added deterministic sapling spawning (1 per 30s global cadence) with cap=50; prefers near existing trees; falls back to any valid GRASS+buildable tile; marks world tile to TileType.TREE on spawn; added helper remove_trees_in_footprint for integration.
tests/test_nature_spawns_saplings.py (new): verifies cadence, tile marking, and cap enforcement.
